description: These slip-on heels from catwalk are perfect for party wear & ndash the multicoloured glitter on the straps will complement any party dress or ethnic party ensemble. Pop these on to jazz up your outfit when you're dressing to impress. Upper Glitter covered strap covering the forefoot and extending on the sides to the midfoot for a snug Fit and great visual appeal Shiny gold sole for added style Outsole TPU outsole with high-shine heel Sandal Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
